creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to m.ne from comment #5)

Looks good, nice work :)

One last thing: 

MAINTAINER should match the maintainers Bugzilla account email (or vice-versa), so Bugzilla can automatically notify you when issues are created for your ports, and so we can verify you when you set maintainer-approval flags on future patches/attachments.

I'm assuming you are setting yourself as the new maintainer (and that it's not someone else), so either update MAINTAINER or your Bugzilla account email address
